mapper.select:
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN resolved = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unresolved_count, SUM(CASE WHEN resolved = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS resolved_count, COALESCE(SUM(wrong_count), 0) AS total_wrong_count FROM wrong_book_item WHERE user_id = #{userId}
AND subject_id = #{subjectId}

SELECT s.id AS subject_id, s.name AS subject_name, COUNT(*) AS unresolved_count FROM wrong_book_item w INNER JOIN subject s ON s.id = w.subject_id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} AND w.resolved = 0 GROUP BY s.id, s.name, s.sort_order ORDER BY s.sort_order ASC, s.name ASC

SELECT t.id AS topic_id, t.name AS topic_name, s.id AS subject_id, s.name AS subject_name, SUM(CASE WHEN w.resolved = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unresolved_count, COALESCE(SUM(w.wrong_count), 0) AS total_wrong_count, REPLACE(CAST(MAX(w.last_wrong_at) AS CHAR), ' ', 'T') AS last_wrong_at FROM wrong_book_item w INNER JOIN topic t ON t.id = w.topic_id INNER JOIN subject s ON s.id = w.subject_id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} AND w.subject_id = #{subjectId} GROUP BY t.id, t.name, t.sort_order, s.id, s.name HAVING total_wrong_count > 0 ORDER BY unresolved_count DESC, MAX(w.last_wrong_at) DESC, t.sort_order ASC, t.name ASC

SELECT CAST(w.question_id AS CHAR) AS question_id, q.stem, q.explanation, q.type, CAST(s.id AS CHAR) AS subject_id, s.name AS subject_name, CAST(t.id AS CHAR) AS topic_id, t.name AS topic_name, w.wrong_count, REPLACE(CAST(w.first_wrong_at AS CHAR), ' ', 'T') AS first_wrong_at, REPLACE(CAST(w.last_wrong_at AS CHAR), ' ', 'T') AS last_wrong_at, CASE WHEN w.resolved = 1 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS resolved, w.correct_option_keys FROM wrong_book_item w INNER JOIN question q ON q.id = w.question_id INNER JOIN subject s ON s.id = w.subject_id INNER JOIN topic t ON t.id = w.topic_id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} AND w.question_id = #{questionId}
SELECT CAST(id AS CHAR) AS id, CAST(question_id AS CHAR) AS question_id, option_key, content FROM question_option WHERE question_id = #{questionId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, option_key ASC

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subject) AS subject_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM topic) AS topic_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM question) AS question_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM practice_session WHERE user_id = #{userId}) AS total_sessions, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM practice_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND finished_at IS NOT NULL) AS completed_sessions, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_answer WHERE user_id = #{userId}) AS total_answers, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(is_correct), 0) FROM user_answer WHERE user_id = #{userId}) AS correct_answers, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT question_id) FROM user_answer WHERE user_id = #{userId}) AS answered_unique_questions, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wrong_book_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND resolved = 0) AS unresolved_wrong_count, ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(answered_at)) FROM user_answer WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE(answered_at) >= #{activeSince} ) AS active_days_last7

SELECT CAST(CAST(answered_at AS DATE) AS CHAR) AS date_key, CAST(CAST(answered_at AS DATE) AS CHAR) AS label, COUNT(*) AS answer_count, COALESCE(SUM(is_correct), 0) AS correct_count FROM user_answer WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND CAST(CAST(answered_at AS DATE) AS CHAR) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY CAST(CAST(answered_at AS DATE) AS CHAR) ORDER BY date_key ASC

SELECT CAST(s.id AS CHAR) AS subject_id, s.name AS subject_name, COUNT(DISTINCT q.id) AS total_questions, COUNT(DISTINCT ua.question_id) AS answered_questions, COUNT(ua.id) AS answer_count, COALESCE(SUM(ua.is_correct), 0) AS correct_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wrong_book_item w WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} AND w.subject_id = s.id AND w.resolved = 0 ) AS unresolved_wrong_count FROM subject s LEFT JOIN question q ON q.subject_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user_answer ua ON ua.user_id = #{userId} AND ua.question_id = q.id GROUP BY s.id, s.name, s.sort_order ORDER BY s.sort_order ASC, s.name ASC

SELECT CAST(t.id AS CHAR) AS topic_id, t.name AS topic_name, CAST(s.id AS CHAR) AS subject_id, s.name AS subject_name, COUNT(DISTINCT q.id) AS total_questions, COUNT(DISTINCT ua.question_id) AS answered_questions, COUNT(ua.id) AS answer_count, COALESCE(SUM(ua.is_correct), 0) AS correct_count FROM topic t INNER JOIN subject s ON s.id = t.subject_id INNER JOIN question q ON q.topic_id = t.id LEFT JOIN user_answer ua ON ua.user_id = #{userId} AND ua.question_id = q.id GROUP BY t.id, t.name, t.sort_order, s.id, s.name ORDER BY t.sort_order ASC, t.name ASC

SELECT ps.id, ps.mode, CAST(ps.topic_id AS CHAR) AS topic_id, ps.scope_title, s.name AS subject_name, ps.question_count, ps.correct_count, REPLACE(CAST(ps.started_at AS CHAR), ' ', 'T') AS started_at, REPLACE(CAST(ps.finished_at AS CHAR), ' ', 'T') AS finished_at FROM practice_session ps INNER JOIN subject s ON s.id = ps.subject_id WHERE ps.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY COALESCE(ps.finished_at, ps.started_at) DESC, ps.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

WITH RECURSIVE subtree(id) AS ( SELECT id FROM topic WHERE id = #{topicId} UNION ALL SELECT topic.id FROM topic INNER JOIN subtree ON topic.parent_id = subtree.id ) SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM topic WHERE parent_id = #{topicId}) AS child_topic_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM question WHERE topic_id IN (SELECT id FROM subtree)) AS question_count, ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ua.question_id) FROM user_answer ua WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} AND ua.question_id IN (SELECT id FROM question WHERE topic_id IN (SELECT id FROM subtree)) ) AS answered_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wrong_book_item w WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} AND w.topic_id IN (SELECT id FROM subtree) AND w.resolved = 0 ) AS wrong_count
